Check for logical and functional dependencies in file 'simulated_data_7.csv'

-------------------------------------
Data           | simulated_data_7.csv
No. of rows    | 5000                
No. of columns | 32                  
No. of LDs     | 16799               
No. of FDs     | 33                  
-------------------------------------


========================================
Logical Dependencies (LDs)
========================================

Condition | Implication               
--------------------------------------
Q = 0     | Functional dependency (FD)
0 < Q < 1 | Logical dependency (LD)   
Q = 1     | No dependency             
Lower Q   | Stronger dependency       
--------------------------------------

Note: Functional dependencies are a special case of logical dependencies.


Layer 1 (10 dependencies)
----------------------------------------
{ "AD" } ~> { "AA" } (q=0.1000)
{ "AD" } ~> { "AB" } (q=0.1000)
{ "AD" } ~> { "AC" } (q=0.2000)
{ "AD" } ~> { "AF" } (q=0.2000)

{ "M" } ~> { "K" } (q=0.1459)
